name: Three-Cheese Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 2 cups (8 ounces) shredded sharp Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in water in a small saucepan; place over low heat and stir until dissolved.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the next nine ingredients and stir well.
3. Stir in the gelatin mixture.
4. Lightly coat a 4-cup mold with mayonnaise.
5. Pour the cheese mixture into the mold and chill overnight or until firm.
6. Unmold onto a serving plate.
7. Garnish with chopped parsley and cherry tomatoes, if desired.
8. Serve with crackers. Yield: about 3 1/4 cups.
